channel.title: math on Epistemophilia
channel.description: Recent content in math on Epistemophilia

item.title: Notes on Generating Functions and Character Polynomial
item.description: Notes on Generating Functions and Character Polynomial Generating Functions Generating Functions are formal power series that play important roles in Combinatorics. Specifically， We may assume that a generating functions should look like this: $$ g(x ) = u_0+u_1x+u_2x^2+\cdots + u_nx^n+\cdots. \tag{1} $$ Suppose that there is another generating function: $$ f(x)=v_0+v_1x+v_2x^2+\cdots + v_nx^n+\cdots. \tag{2} $$ It’s easy to find that we can define the multiply two generating functions the way we define convergence:
